The '''Yavin Vassilika''' was a priceless, gem-like statuette believed to be little more than legend. It was eventually hunted down by a group of [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] and [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] in service to a trio of [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]], [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]], [[Malta]], and [[Embra]]. They merely wished to use it as a competitive goal between themselves.

The chase included [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]], [[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]], [[IG-88B/Legends|IG-88B]], [[Zuckuss/Legends|Zuckuss]], [[4-LOM/Legends|4-LOM]], [[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]], [[Garindan/Legends|Garindan]], [[Sardu Sallowe]] and [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]. In the end, the Vassilika was found outside the rim, and snatched by Malta's assistants, [[Jozzel Moffet]], unknowingly acting on behalf of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]—and Han's first love, [[Bria Tharen]]. The hunters found [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]] with the Vassilika, who, to their horror, smashed it on the ground, revealing that it contained a key to one of the strategically important [[Great Temple/Legends|Massassi Temples]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].

==Characteristics==
The Yavin Vassilika was described as a statue that was adorned with various [[Massassi/Legends|Massassi]] hieroglyphics. It was sculpted from a single [[Corusca gem/Legends|Corusca gem]], which Malta claimed was the "hardest substance in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]." Jozzel Moffet regarded the object as a [[Paperweight/Legends|paperweight]].
